sourceDescription: Decode a saved image or scan a QR code with your camera.
uploadDescription: Choose a local image and read the QR code without uploading it.
chooseImageLabel: Drag and drop an image here, or click to upload
uploadHint: The image is decoded locally on this device.
supportedFormatsLabel: Supports PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF, SVG, AVIF, and other browser-readable images.
cameraDescription: Use the rear camera when available and keep the QR code inside the frame.
cameraIdleDescription: Start the camera, then point it at a QR code.
cameraScanningDescription: Hold the code steady inside the square frame.
cameraUnsupportedDescription: This browser does not expose camera access for the page.
cameraPermissionDescription: Allow camera access in the browser and try again.
cameraErrorDescription: The camera could not be started. Try another browser or input method.
resultDescription: Review the decoded payload, copy it, or open supported links.
emptyResultDescription: Upload an image or start the camera to decode the first result.
imageLoadError: The image could not be loaded. Try another file.
canvasUnavailableError: This browser could not prepare the image for scanning.
canvasReadError: The image pixels could not be read. Try a different file format.
noQrFoundError: No QR code was found in that image.
cameraFrameError: The camera frame could not be scanned.
